content.en:
Ye Tian found a classic, a notepad similar to a diary-type notebook, which recorded many big events and part of the experience of this top true monarch.

This True Monarch's name is Zhao Ke, and he is a true disciple of the Heavenly Ape Sect, and he is one of the more ordinary true disciples.

But what shocked Ye Tian was the record about the back-

"Today, I went to the Holy Sect with the Sect Master to congratulate the Holy Sect on the birthday of one of the Holy Sect Elders. The Holy Sect is very powerful, and the guards guarding it are all puppets at the True Ancestor level, and I also saw a Holy Son of the Holy Sect, who is very demonic, and there is also a Dao Ancestor puppet as a guard. It would be great if I could join the Holy Sect and become the Holy Son!"

Seeing the information on this page, Ye Tian was shocked.

He didn't know about the so-called Holy Sect, but a Holy Son actually had a puppet of the Dao Ancestor, which was too exaggerated, right?

In the entire chaotic countless territories, Dao Ancestor is also the top existence, how can a Holy Son have a Dao Ancestor puppet as a guard?

If there is really a Dao Ancestor puppet, it will definitely be regarded as the real hole card of a top power!

Ye Tian was very surprised in his heart, but he continued to browse the content behind the notepad.

Soon, he saw another page of astonishing records of events.

"Something big happened, I heard that an amazing treasure was born, many forces fought each other, I heard that many Dao Ancestors fell, and even many supreme Dao Ancestors were killed. Our Heavenly Ape Sect is too weak, we don't even have a Dao Ancestor, I hope this matter will not affect our Heavenly Ape Sect, otherwise our Heavenly Ape Sect will be completely finished!"

Seeing this, Ye Tian's pupils shrank.

A large number of Dao Ancestors have fallen, what an amazing thing!

Moreover, the strongest Dao Ancestor, what level is this, it is definitely not an ordinary Dao Ancestor, perhaps the most powerful existence among the Dao Ancestors.

However, these beings have fallen, which shows how tragic the fight was.

The last page.

Ye Tian saw panic and despair in the handwriting.

"It's over, everything is over, the realm is going to be shattered, that treasure has attracted outsiders, the legendary supreme realm lord is going to fall, and everyone is going to die......"

Domain?

Realm Lord?

Ye Tian's expression changed, as if he knew a great secret.

From this True Monarch's notebook, it can be known that the Heavenly Ape Sect should be a force in the domain realm, and it is a very weak force, and there are many Dao ancestors in the domain realm.

A treasure attracted many forces to fight, many Dao Ancestors fell, and later attracted strong people outside the domain realm, and the lord of the domain realm fought with it, and also fell and died.

And in this great war, the domain boundary was shattered.

That's probably how it happened!

"In that case, isn't that Realm Lord even more powerful than Dao Ancestor? No, it may also be a Dao Ancestor, but far superior to other Dao Ancestors. After all, Dao Ancestor is already the ultimate of chaos, and it is impossible for an existence stronger than Dao Ancestor to appear!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Dao Ancestor is the ultimate in cultivation, which is the common sense knowledge of chaos.

Therefore, Ye Tian would not think that the Realm Lord was an existence above the Dao Ancestor.

But Ye Tian was very puzzled at the moment, because he had a large number of Dao Ancestors' domain realms, and he knew that it was not an ordinary place at this glance.

However, he hadn't even been to Chaos, maybe Chaos was not as simple as he imagined, there must be a lot of secrets, maybe Chaos just had some realms, just like hidden forces.

It's just that he hasn't reached that level, and the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor will naturally not tell him.

"Go back and ask Shizun about the domain realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

There are no good things in the bedroom of this true disciple of the Heavenly Ape Sect, it is estimated that the treasures are all on the body of that true disciple, and that true disciple died in the outside world, so the treasures are lost.

"It's time to leave!"

Ye Tian quickly left the building and headed towards the rest of the Heavenly Ape Sect.

Next, Ye Tian and the other True Monarchs broke through several residences of disciples of the Heavenly Ape Sect, and immediately understood one thing.

There are almost no good things in the residences of the disciples of the Heavenly Ape Sect these days, although there are some True Monarch puppets, but these True Monarch puppets have no way to subdue them, they can only destroy them, so they are not of high value.

If you keep going like this, you won't have much to gain by entering the ruins this time.

"The treasures of the disciples of the Ape Sect are estimated to be on themselves these days, just like me, almost all of my treasures are on my body, and there are only some miscellaneous items in the residence, and the value is not very high!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, he was not ready to continue to attack the residences of these Heavenly Ape Sect disciples, but went to the central area of the Heavenly Ape Sect.

This is the real core area of the Heavenly Ape Sect, and although there are many ruins, there are definitely more good things.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian received the information of Longhai Zhenjun——

"Little junior brother, come here......"

After Ye Tian received the information, he hurriedly went to the place where Longhai Zhenjun was.

---------------

In front of a half-dilapidated ruin.

A Ming Zhenjun stood here, and Ye Tian also came here and stood beside Longhai Zhenjun.

"Senior Brother Long Hai!"

Ye Tian said softly.

"Little junior brother, look there!"

Long Hai Zhenjun pointed in the direction of the ruins and said.

Ye Tian followed the direction pointed by Longhai Zhenjun and forgot about it, only to see that in the center of the ruins that stretched for thousands of miles, there was a huge broken stone tablet, and the broken stone tablet exuded a force, forming layers of special space.

"Little junior brother, this ruin should be an assessment place for the Heavenly Ape Sect, someone tried to get close to that stone tablet and entered the layers of space for assessment, the Heavenly Ape Sect seems to attach great importance to refining the body, so the content of the assessment is almost related to the refining body. Although there is no reward for the assessment, the content of the assessment is a broken body refining secret technique, and these body refining secret techniques alone are worth a lot of money!"

Long Hai Zhenjun introduced,

"Oh, about the secret art of body refining!"

Ye Tian became interested.

Although he has the Xuanxuan Jue True Spirit Chapter, in fact, the Void Heaven First Pulse is not good at refining the body, for example, the Void Heaven One Vein's Alchemy Secret Technique is above the Void Heaven One Vein, so the Xuan Xuan Jue True Spirit Chapter is not too awesome at all.

According to Ye Tian's calculations, even if he practiced the Xuan Xuan Jue True Spirit Chapter to the ninth layer, he would not be able to advance his body to the limit of his physical body, and this ruin was not simple, and there might be a secret technique of refining the body that would help him a lot.

"Senior Brother Long Hai, let's go in together!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Good!"

Long Hai Zhenjun nodded.

Immediately, Ye Tian and Longhai Zhenjun entered the ruins together and walked into the first layer of the assessment space formed by the broken stone stele.
